name: easycc
description: Compiler for the Easy language (Wetherell's 'Etudes for Programmers', 1978), emitting C
author: Alexander Demin

scripts.build:playground: printf 'export const BUILD_TIME = "%s";\n' "$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')" > docs/build-info.ts && bun build docs/playground.ts --target=browser --format=esm --outfile=docs/playground.js
scripts.prepublishOnly: SKIP_RUN=1 bun run test.ts && bun run build
